review_text: WARNING: The NutriBlast 3000 blade FLEW OFF during use and nearly hit my child. This is a serious safety hazard. I've reported this to the manufacturer and plan to contact the consumer safety commission. The blender should be recalled. Contacted customer service and they offered me a $10 coupon. Completely unacceptable.

scoring_notes.notes: urgency MUST be high — safety hazard, injury risk, regulatory complaint
